title: lycianthes rostellata
intro: Lycianthes rostellata, also known as the purple flowered lycianthes or purple flowered nightshade, is a flowering plant species in the Solanaceae family, native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Lycianthes rostellata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote healing of skin irritations, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
